titleStmt.title: SII 20.124: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 124. (B.K. No. 83 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone set up near the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 3, Viśvāvasu, Mārgaśira śu 9, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1185, December 2, Monday.
The inscription records the death of Seṭṭima-nāyaka, a servant of Chaladaṁkarāma Mādiseṭṭi of Kalukere during the cattle-raid made by Tailahadēva of Dēvaṅgēri. Cf. Nos. 125 and 126 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jitēna labhyatē lakṣmī mritēnāpi surāṁganākṣaṇavidhvaṁsini kāyē kā ciṁtā maraṇē raṇē
svasti śrīmaccāḷukya cakravartti tribhuvanamalla sōmēśvaradēvavariṣada 3 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsa
rada mārggasira su 9 sōmavāradaṁdu dēvaṁgēriya tailahadēvaṁ śrīmaccaladaṁka rāma maṁneya jā
ju mādiseṭṭiya kalukeṟeya tuṟuvaṁ koḷvalliya raṇadoḷu . tandeyu maganuṁ raṇa doḷu saṁdubha
ya balaṁgaḷeraḍu meccalu nindiṟidu hondidāgaḷu suraduṁdubhiyeseyaluke dēva kaṁneyaroydar .
va . Antu subhaṭara javanuṁ sitaganāykara gaṁḍanu seṭṭiyanāykaṁ caladaṁkarāmanaṁ meccisi niṟisida vīrasāsana .

© vīrāvatāramenipudu dhāriṇiyo kalukeṟeyadaṟoḷu māriya mūri
yenippadiraṁ seṭṭimeyanāyka jagadoḷagellaṁ khyātaṁ bhūtaḷake tiḷaka menisi
ye taṁna kulakaṁ mātina sāsa māto caladaṁkarāmanaṇugina baṁṭa . ©
surakānteyaroḍanartthiye nereya renisisutanuṁ tānu narabhaṭaraṭṭeya me
ṭṭiye siratōraṇadiṁde dēvalōka daru . śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
